offer: For restaurant procurement officers processing 10–20 invoices/month, supplier invoice non-compliance causes financial discrepancies. We automate compliance audits instead of manual invoice checks and audits.
problem: Supplier invoice non-compliance leading to financial discrepancies.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement officers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on compliance
DM outreach to procurement officers with demo video
Participate in forums for procurement tool discussions
try_it: Let users try compliance checklist and manual entry form
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early access to first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
